scientific_question: Can A328's target-blind stable-region transfer mechanism be converted into exact bounded-regret execution orders before the A322 W45 assignment is known?

operator_contract.partition: stable iff the exact A328 W44 and W45 nearest-prototype indices are equal; switched otherwise
operator_contract.base_order_pair: original raw nearest-prototype Linf W44 and W45 orders retained by A327
operator_contract.within_partition_order: preserve the corresponding raw-Linf source order exactly

candidate_definitions.stable_first: all stable-stream cells followed by all switched-stream cells
candidate_definitions.stable_switched_1_to_1: one stable then one switched cell repeatedly; append the nonempty tail
candidate_definitions.stable_switched_2_to_1: two stable then one switched cell repeatedly; append the nonempty tail
candidate_definitions.switched_stable_2_to_1_control: two switched then one stable cell repeatedly; append the nonempty tail

operator_contract.primary_operator_reason: A328 measured stable-subset rho 0.4715964844916638 versus switched-subset rho 0.2627842419973867; their ratio 1.7946 is represented by the smallest integer stability-favoring schedule 2:1

regret_contract.stable_switched_1_to_1: each cell rank is at most 2 times its raw-Linf rank
regret_contract.stable_switched_2_to_1: stable-cell rank is at most ceil(3r/2); switched-cell rank is at most 3r, hence global factor at most 3

predeclared_outputs: five exact 4096-cell W44 and W45 order pairs and uint16be hashes
exact per-class and global regret panels against raw Linf
one frozen primary W45 order and one symmetric direction-control order
post-A322 counterfactual rank panel from the single complete A322 execution
post-A325 counterfactual rank panel from the single complete A325 execution
